zh.Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands: 荷蘭奧維利瑟爾代文特
zh.Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, France: 法國皮卡迪奧易皮朋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont於1345年出生在荷蘭藍德時，她的父親Thibault de Bar31歲，母親Marie de Namur de Dampierre23歲。她於1360年10月18日與Otto van Arkel在荷蘭奧維利瑟爾代文特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年5月11日之前在法國皮卡迪奧易皮朋特，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭格利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont于1345年出生在荷兰藍德时，她的父亲Thibault de Bar31岁，母亲Marie de Namur de Dampierre23岁。她于1360年10月18日与Otto van Arkel在荷兰奧維利瑟爾代文特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年5月11日之前在法国皮卡迪奧易皮朋特，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭格利姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont was born in 1345, in Zeeland, Netherlands, her father, Thibault de Bar, was 31 and her mother, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, was 23. She married Otto van Arkel on 18 October 1360, in Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 11 May 1411, in Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, France, and was buried in Gorinchem, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont est née en 1345, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Thibault de Bar, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Otto van Arkel le 18 octobre 1360, à Deventer, Overijssel, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 11 mai 1411, à Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, France, et a été enterrée à Gorinchem, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont 1345 in Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibault de Bar 31 und ihre Mutter Marie de Namur de Dampierre 23. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1360 in Deventer, Oberyssel, Niederlande Otto van Arkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 11. Mai 1411 in Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Gorinchem, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont è nata il nel 1345 nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Thibault de Bar, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Otto van Arkel il 18 ottobre 1360, nel Deventer, Overijssel, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 11 maggio 1411, nel Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, e fu sepolta a Gorinchem, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepontが1345年にオランダゼエランドで生まれた時，父Thibault de Barは31歳，母Marie de Namur de Dampierreは23歳であった。1360年10月18日にオランダオバーイジセルデベンターでOtto van Arkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年5月11日以前にフランスピカーディオイゼピエレプオントで死去し，オランダホーランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont(이)가 1345년 네덜란드 제랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibault de Bar(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Namur de Dampierre(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1360년 10월 18일 네덜란드 버리j셀 데븐터에서 Otto van Arkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 5월 11일 이전 프랑스 피카디 이스 피레폰트에서 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont nasceu em 1345, em Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Thibault de Bar, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto van Arkel em 18 de outubro de 1360, em Deventer, Overijssel, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 11 de maio de 1411, em Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, França, e foi sepultada em Gorinchem, Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont родилась в 1345 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Thibault de Bar было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marie de Namur de Dampierre, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto van Arkel 18 октября 1360 г. в местности дивентир, овириджссел, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 11 май 1411 г. в местности пьиррепонт, оис, пикарди, Франция и была похоронена в местности горинчем, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont nació en 1345, en Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Thibault de Bar, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Otto van Arkel el 18 de octubre de 1360, en Deventer, Overijssel, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 11 de mayo de 1411, en Pierrepont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, y fue sepultada en Gorinchem, Holland, Países Bajos.
